description: Current official Health Canada federal contaminated-sites guidance pages to add to Zotero as metadata-only webpage records.

item.title: Contaminated sites: Reports and publications
item.abstractNote: Health Canada contaminated-sites reports and publications landing page. Use as the current-source index for federal contaminated-site human health risk assessment guidance.
